name: Made Redundant — Auto Ingest (Claude Haiku, Weekly)

nodes.name: Every Week
nodes.notes: Runs every 7 days. Change weeksInterval to adjust.

parameters.name: q
parameters.value: (layoffs OR redundancies OR "job cuts") AND ("artificial intelligence" OR automation OR AI)

nodes.name: Fetch News Articles
nodes.notes: Global search — fetches last 48h of news. Free tier = 100 req/day, well within limits.

parameters.name: q
parameters.value: (redundan* OR "job cuts" OR layoffs OR "workforce reduction") AND ("artificial intelligence" OR automation OR AI)

nodes.name: Fetch AU/NZ Articles
nodes.notes: AU/NZ domain-targeted search. Sources: itnews.com.au, smartcompany.com.au, ia.acs.org.au, afr.com, nzherald.co.nz, reseller.co.nz, rnz.co.nz, hcamag.com, stuff.co.nz, cyberdaily.au, capitalbrief.com, mi-3.com.au

nodes.name: Merge Article Lists
nodes.notes: Combines global and AU/NZ feeds, deduplicates by URL. Passes a single articles array to the filter step.

nodes.name: Sanitize Text
nodes.notes: Strips control chars / quotes / backslashes from title+description before Claude JSON interpolation. Fixes 'JSON parameter needs to be valid JSON' error when article text contains special characters.

nodes.name: Classify with Claude Haiku
nodes.notes: Uses claude-haiku — cheapest model. ~4,000 tokens per 48hr run (up to 40 articles now with merged feeds).

nodes.name: Dedup Within Run
nodes.notes: Prevents duplicate writes when both global + AU/NZ feeds find articles about the same company in the same run.

nodes.name: Write to Google Sheet
nodes.notes: Uses API key auth (read-only key won't work here — needs write access via OAuth2 or a service account key).

_meta.name: Made Redundant — n8n Pipeline
_meta.description: Fetches AI layoff news every 48h from global + AU/NZ sources, classifies with Claude Haiku (~8k tokens/run), deduplicates, writes to Google Sheets. Dashboard auto-updates.
_meta.tokenEstimate: ~120 input + ~80 output per article × up to 40 articles = ~8,000 tokens per 48hr cycle
_meta.author: Cogniflow Technologies — maderedundant.io
